items.name: button
items.description: Primary action element. TLB orange default, charcoal secondary, dark-orange destructive.

items.name: input
items.description: Single-line text input. Always paired with a Label.

items.name: textarea
items.description: Multi-line text input. Minimum 3 rows.

items.name: label
items.description: Form label. Required on every form field per TLB a11y rule.

items.name: select
items.description: Single-choice selector for short option lists (under 12 items).

items.name: checkbox
items.description: Boolean or multi-select checkbox. Checked state uses TLB orange.

items.name: radio-group
items.description: Single choice from 2 to 5 visible options.

items.name: switch
items.description: Boolean toggle with immediate effect. Prefer over checkbox when state changes instantly.

items.name: card
items.description: Default container block. CardTitle uses font-display uppercase per TLB convention.

items.name: dialog
items.description: Non-destructive modal. Title is font-display uppercase.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.description: Destructive confirmations. Confirm action defaults to destructive variant.

items.name: sheet
items.description: Side panel for secondary detail or quick edit. Defaults to right side.

items.name: tooltip
items.description: Short hover/focus label. Inverted: foreground bg, background text. Never for required info.

items.name: popover
items.description: Interactive floating panel: filter pickers, inline edit, date pickers.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.description: Action menu attached to a button or row. Destructive items use text-destructive.

items.name: table
items.description: Basic table. Headers are font-display uppercase. For sort/paginate use the DataTable composite.

items.name: tabs
items.description: Top-level switching inside a page. Never nested inside a card.

items.name: separator
items.description: Visual divider. Replaces native hr element.

items.name: badge
items.description: Status pill. Default uses orange-tint accent. rounded-sm not full.

items.name: skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder. Use one per visible block.

items.name: sonner
items.description: Toast notifications. Mount Toaster at app root. One toast per user action.

items.name: form
items.description: react-hook-form integration. Pairs with zod schema in src/schemas/.

items.name: app-shell
items.description: Top-level layout: sidebar slot + topbar slot + scrollable main. Used at the root of every TLB internal app.

items.name: page-header
items.description: Standardized page header: uppercase TLB-orange title, subtitle, right-aligned actions.

items.name: data-table
items.description: Generic table with @tanstack/react-table headless + shadcn Table primitives. Sort + paginate built in.

items.name: kpi-card
items.description: Headline dashboard metric: label, value, optional delta, optional lucide icon.

items.name: empty-state
items.description: Standardized empty placeholder: icon, headline, description, primary action.

items.name: status-badge
items.description: Status pill with paired lucide icon. Statuses: draft, pending, approved, rejected.

items.name: chart-tooltip
items.description: Themed recharts tooltip content: monospace card with one line per series. Accepts a format function for currency/percent rendering.

items.name: file-upload
items.description: Drag-and-drop file dropzone with click-to-browse fallback. Reads selected file as text and forwards via onFile. Suits CSV imports.

items.name: sparkline
items.description: Inline bar-chart sparkline for KPI cards and dense rows. Values normalized 0..1; trailing bar colored by trend direction.

items.name: delta
items.description: Formatted change indicator with directional marker, mono numerals, and pos/neg tokens. Derives sign from the numeric value.

items.name: signal-badge
items.description: Data-signal pill for financial transaction state (settled/pending/failed/draft) with a dot prefix. Distinct from workflow StatusBadge.

items.name: live-sync
items.description: Pulsing-dot status chip for live data freshness: ok (green), stale (amber), down (red), paired with a status label.

items.name: brand-mark
items.description: Official TLB wordmark inside a black lozenge. Three pre-sized variants for sidebar tile, header chip, and large branded surface.

items.name: tool-launcher
items.description: Card-style launcher tile for a dashboard tools grid: icon chip, title, description, meta line, arrow indicator on hover.
